query: SELECT ta.id, ta.tenantId, ta.leadManagerId, lm.name as lm_name, lm.teamRole as lm_role, ta.acquisitionManagerId, am.name as am_name, am.teamRole as am_role FROM team_assignments ta JOIN team_members lm ON ta.leadManagerId = lm.id JOIN team_members am ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = am.id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT ta.id, ta.tenantId, ta.leadManagerId, lm.name as lm_name, lm.teamRole as lm_role, ta.acquisitionManagerId, am.name as am_name, am.teamRole as am_role FROM team_assignments ta JOIN team_members lm ON ta.leadManagerId = lm.id JOIN team_members am ON ta.acquisitionManagerId = am.id LIMIT 20;
